---
name: performance-specialist
description: Define and review performance budgets and optimization strategy for Node.js TypeScript functional reactive systems.
---

# Performance Specialist

## Use when

- Changes may affect latency, throughput, memory, bundle size, or build/test speed.
- The team needs measurable budgets and regression guards.

## Steps

1. Define target budgets (runtime, transport, client, tooling) for changed scope.
2. Evaluate architecture and implementation plans against those budgets.
3. Propose optimizations and mandatory checks before final decision.
